query: SELECT drillId, thumbnailUrl, LEFT(imageBase64, 100) as imageBase64Preview, imageMimeType, briefDescription, difficulty, category FROM drillCustomizations LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3knp7kHgPS8ePkR.root --database 4gdCHRuKFjrDK3bmH43Eh2 --execute SELECT drillId, thumbnailUrl, LEFT(imageBase64, 100) as imageBase64Preview, imageMimeType, briefDescription, difficulty, category FROM drillCustomizations LIMIT 5;

rows.briefDescription: A foundational hitting drill that teaches proper swing mechanics and timing. Perfect for beginners to develop consistent contact.
